collections.title: Ceramics Collection
collections.description: Artisanal vessels for the curated home. Hand-thrown or slab-built by master potters using ethically sourced clays and natural pigment glazes.

products.name: Handcrafted Ceramic Vase
products.about: Each vessel is a testament to the slow rhythm of the potter's wheel. Meticulously hand-thrown using locally sourced stoneware, the piece features an intentionally irregular silhouette that celebrates its human origin. The natural sandstone glaze reacts uniquely in the kiln, resulting in subtle mineral speckles and a tactile, matte finish that mimics the raw beauty of weathered earth.

reviews.name: ELARA JENNINGS
reviews.comment: The texture is even more beautiful in person. It has this incredible grounding weight to it that you only get with high-quality stoneware. It sits perfectly on my mantle.

reviews.name: MARCUS THORNE
reviews.comment: A truly stunning piece of art. The glaze has subtle variations that catch the afternoon light beautifully. Shipping took a little longer than expected, but it was worth the wait for something this special.

reviews.name: SARAH CHEN
reviews.comment: The sculptural form is so unique. It functions as a vase but honestly stands alone as a sculpture. I've bought three pieces from this series now and they are all flawless.

products.name: Earthen Pitcher
products.about: Poured with an easy, generous handle and a gently tapered spout, this pitcher is thrown in small batches and finished with a natural sandstone glaze that deepens with every use. Equal parts everyday workhorse and quiet centerpiece.

reviews.name: NADIA OSEI
reviews.comment: Pours beautifully and looks even better on the table. The glaze catches the light in a really lovely way.

reviews.name: TOM BRADLEY
reviews.comment: Solid, well-made piece. A little heavier than I expected, but that's a good thing for stability.

reviews.name: PRIYA KAPOOR
reviews.comment: Used it daily for iced tea all summer. Holds up beautifully and the color has only gotten richer.

products.name: Basin Bowls
products.about: A set of three nesting basin bowls in a charcoal matte finish, each slightly varied in size and glaze pattern. Designed to stack cleanly for storage and to move effortlessly from prep to table.

reviews.name: JULIA MORENO
reviews.comment: The charcoal matte finish is gorgeous and the three sizes nest perfectly for storage. Exactly what I wanted.

reviews.name: DEREK HALL
reviews.comment: Great weight and finish. These have become our everyday serving bowls.

reviews.name: ANNIKA ROSS
reviews.comment: Beautiful set, though one bowl arrived with a tiny glaze imperfection. Customer service was quick to help.

products.name: Modern Amphora
products.about: An architectural silhouette inspired by classic amphora forms, reimagined with a modern terracotta body and a hand-brushed iron wash. A statement piece that anchors a shelf or console with quiet drama.

reviews.name: GABRIEL LIU
reviews.comment: This is the statement piece our living room needed. The iron wash gives it real depth.

reviews.name: FIONA WALSH
reviews.comment: Even bigger and more striking than the photos suggested. Packaging was excellent too.

reviews.name: OMAR SALEH
reviews.comment: Beautiful form. Wish there were a slightly smaller size option for tighter spaces.

products.name: Ritual Burner
products.about: A compact incense and resin burner glazed in a speckled stone finish. Its rounded form and heat-safe interior make it a small, grounding ritual object for daily use.

reviews.name: LENA VOSS
reviews.comment: Small but so lovely. The speckled glaze looks different every time the light shifts.

reviews.name: CARTER JAMES
reviews.comment: Does exactly what it should and looks great doing it. Good size for a nightstand.

reviews.name: YUKI TANAKA
reviews.comment: Part of my evening wind-down ritual now. Well made and beautifully finished.

products.name: Sipping Cups
products.about: A duo of low, wide sipping cups dipped in an indigo wash over warm stoneware. Sized for coffee, tea, or a quiet glass of wine, with a comfortable hand-thrown rim.

reviews.name: ISABEL CRUZ
reviews.comment: The indigo wash is even richer in person. My favorite cups for morning coffee now.

reviews.name: HENRY PARK
reviews.comment: Nice weight and a comfortable rim to drink from. Bought a second set as a gift.

reviews.name: MEGAN FOSTER
reviews.comment: Simple, elegant, and well made. Exactly the understated look I was after.

products.name: Crackle Platter
products.about: A wide serving platter finished with fine hand-etched detailing and a subtle crackle glaze that develops character over time. Built for centerpiece spreads and everyday entertaining alike.

reviews.name: ROSALIND KIM
reviews.comment: The etched detailing is so much finer than I expected from photos. Stunning centerpiece for dinner parties.

reviews.name: VICTOR NGUYEN
reviews.comment: Great size for serving a spread. A little delicate, so I'd recommend hand washing.

reviews.name: CLAIRE DUBOIS
reviews.comment: The crackle glaze has already started developing beautiful character after a few uses.

collections.title: Living Room Collection
collections.description: Thoughtfully selected pieces designed to ground your space. From hand-finished walnut to organic textiles, our living room collection celebrates the harmony of natural materials and modern design.

products.name: Solid Walnut Coffee Table
products.about: A low-profile coffee table crafted from solid American walnut, with a hand-finished oil rub that highlights the natural grain. Tapered legs and clean joinery give it a quietly modern, heirloom-quality presence.

reviews.name: BENJAMIN COLE
reviews.comment: The walnut grain is stunning and the joinery feels rock solid. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: ADA MITCHELL
reviews.comment: Arrived well packaged and assembly was minimal. Anchors the whole living room now.

reviews.name: RYAN PATEL
reviews.comment: Gorgeous table. Delivery took a couple weeks longer than the estimate, but it was worth it.

products.name: Textured Wool Throw
products.about: Woven from chunky, undyed wool with a deep textured rib, this throw adds warmth and organic texture to any sofa or bed. Substantial enough for chilly evenings, soft enough for daily use.

reviews.name: OLIVIA BENNETT
reviews.comment: So much thicker and softer than I expected. Drapes beautifully over the sofa.

reviews.name: NOAH FISCHER
reviews.comment: Great texture and warmth. Sheds a little at first but settles down after a wash.

reviews.name: ZARA AHMED
reviews.comment: The natural wool color works with everything in our living room. Really well made.

products.name: Sculptural Ceramic Vase
products.about: A smaller-scale companion to our signature vase series, with the same sculptural, hand-thrown silhouette in a compact size suited to shelves and side tables.

reviews.name: GRACE ELLIOTT
reviews.comment: Perfect scale for a bookshelf accent. Same lovely quality as the larger vase.

reviews.name: LIAM O'CONNOR
reviews.comment: Nice piece, slightly smaller than I pictured, but the form is beautiful.

reviews.name: HANA SATO
reviews.comment: Bought two for a symmetrical console styling. Exactly what I hoped for.

products.name: Linen Slub Sofa
products.about: A generously proportioned sofa upholstered in nubby linen-slub fabric over a solid hardwood frame. Deep seats and relaxed, rounded arms make it a comfortable, textural anchor for any living room.

reviews.name: SOPHIE LARSEN
reviews.comment: Incredibly comfortable and the linen texture is exactly what we wanted. Worth the investment.

reviews.name: MARCO ROSSI
reviews.comment: Beautiful sofa, took a few weeks to arrive given it's made to order, but quality is excellent.

reviews.name: ELLA ROBINSON
reviews.comment: Deep and cozy without being oversized. The neutral linen goes with everything.

products.name: Hand-Woven Jute Rug
products.about: A natural jute rug hand-woven in a simple herringbone pattern, bringing warmth and organic texture underfoot. Reversible construction extends its wear for years of daily life.

reviews.name: DYLAN MOORE
reviews.comment: Great texture and the herringbone weave is very neatly done. Ties the whole room together.

reviews.name: AMARA OKAFOR
reviews.comment: Solid quality jute, took a couple days flat to lay properly after unrolling.

reviews.name: JASPER LIND
reviews.comment: Reversible construction is a nice touch. Wearing evenly after months of foot traffic.

products.name: Matte Black Floor Lamp
products.about: A slender floor lamp in a matte black powder-coated finish, with a warm linen shade that softens ambient light. Weighted base and a simple foot-switch make it as functional as it is sculptural.

reviews.name: THEO NAKASHIMA
reviews.comment: Casts a beautifully warm light and the matte black finish is flawless. Stable base too.

reviews.name: RUBY ANDERSSON
reviews.comment: Great lamp, assembly took about ten minutes and instructions were clear.

reviews.name: KAI WESTON
reviews.comment: Sleek and simple, exactly the silhouette I was looking for next to the reading chair.

products.name: Oak Sideboard
products.about: A long, low sideboard in solid white oak with a hand-rubbed natural finish. Soft-close doors and adjustable interior shelving combine handcrafted joinery with everyday practicality.

reviews.name: IMOGEN PIERCE
reviews.comment: The oak grain is beautiful and the soft-close doors feel genuinely high quality. A real centerpiece.

reviews.name: SAMUEL OKONKWO
reviews.comment: Two of us assembled it in under an hour. Storage inside is generous and well finished.

reviews.name: PENELOPE HART
reviews.comment: Gorgeous piece, on the heavier side to move once assembled, plan accordingly.

products.name: Amber & Oak Candle
products.about: Hand-poured in small batches with a coconut-soy wax blend, this candle layers warm amber and toasted oak notes for a cozy, grounding scent that fills a room without overwhelming it.

reviews.name: CHLOE BERGSTROM
reviews.comment: Warm, cozy scent that isn't overpowering. Burns cleanly and evenly.

reviews.name: MASON WRIGHT
reviews.comment: Nice, subtle scent throw. Would love a slightly bigger vessel for the price.

reviews.name: IVY CALLAHAN
reviews.comment: My new favorite candle. The amber and oak combination is perfect for autumn evenings.

collections.title: Dining Collection
collections.description: Elevate your gathering rituals with our curated collection of handcrafted kitchenware. From artisanal ceramics to sustainably sourced wood, each piece is designed for the tactile beauty of daily use.

products.name: Earthen Pitcher
products.about: Hand-thrown stoneware pitcher sized for the everyday table. A wide, easy-grip handle and gently pinched spout make it as practical as it is handsome, whether serving water or morning juice.

reviews.name: AUDREY SIMMONS
reviews.comment: Great everyday pitcher, easy to pour and pretty enough to leave out on the counter.

reviews.name: LUCAS FERREIRA
reviews.comment: Solid piece, a bit smaller than expected but works well for two.

reviews.name: NATALIE BROOKS
reviews.comment: Handle is comfortable and the glaze looks great on our dining table.

products.name: Reclaimed Oak Board
products.about: A sturdy serving and cutting board milled from sustainably reclaimed oak, each with its own grain pattern and character. Finished with food-safe oil for daily use and easy care.

reviews.name: ELIJAH STONE
reviews.comment: Beautiful grain and substantial weight. Doubles as a serving board when we have guests over.

reviews.name: MIA THIBAULT
reviews.comment: Great quality board, needed a light re-oiling out of the box which was expected.

reviews.name: JONAH REYES
reviews.comment: Every board is a little different, which I love. Ours has a gorgeous knot pattern.

products.name: Terracotta Nesting Bowls
products.about: A set of four terracotta nesting bowls, each a slightly different size for prepping, serving, or snacking. Unglazed exteriors and a warm glazed interior give them a rustic, tactile feel.

reviews.name: ESTHER WALLACE
reviews.comment: Love that they nest so compactly. Perfect for prepping and serving in one set.

reviews.name: DANIEL ABARA
reviews.comment: Nice rustic look, one bowl had slight glaze variation but it's part of the handmade charm.

reviews.name: ROSE MCALLISTER
reviews.comment: Use these constantly for everything from cereal to salads. Great everyday set.

products.name: Forged Brass Spoon
products.about: A hand-forged serving spoon in solid brass with an aged patina finish that deepens beautifully with use. Balanced weight and a comfortable handle make it a small, lasting kitchen tool.

reviews.name: WILLA FRANKLIN
reviews.comment: Beautifully weighted and the patina is already deepening nicely. A small luxury in the kitchen.

reviews.name: COLE ANDERSON
reviews.comment: Lovely spoon, wish it came in a set of two but understand it's sold individually.

reviews.name: PHOEBE LANG
reviews.comment: Gave this as a housewarming gift and the recipient loved the handcrafted feel.

products.name: Washed Linen Napkins
products.about: A set of two napkins woven from European flax linen and stone-washed for immediate softness. Simple, generously sized, and made to soften further with every wash.

reviews.name: SIENNA PRICE
reviews.comment: So soft right out of the package. The linen weight feels substantial and high quality.

reviews.name: ASHER DONNELLY
reviews.comment: Great napkins, ordered a second set to have enough for dinner parties.

reviews.name: TESSA MARSH
reviews.comment: Wash and dry beautifully. The natural wrinkle is part of the charm.

products.name: Charcoal Stem Vase
products.about: A slim stem vase finished in a charcoal matte reactive glaze that shifts subtly with the light. Sized for a single stem or a small gathered bunch, ideal for shelves and nightstands.

reviews.name: MARGOT REESE
reviews.comment: The reactive glaze has such lovely depth. Looks great with a single stem on my desk.

reviews.name: FELIX ADEYEMI
reviews.comment: Nice small piece, exactly the scale I needed for a narrow shelf.

reviews.name: WREN SULLIVAN
reviews.comment: Bought three in a row for a grouping on the mantle. Each one has slightly different glaze character.

collections.title: Bedroom Collection
collections.description: Sanctuaries for rest. Organic linens and soft lighting for the ultimate retreat.

products.name: Washed Linen Pillow Cover
products.about: A relaxed linen pillow cover in a warm terracotta tone, stone-washed for a soft, lived-in hand feel from the first day. Hidden zip closure for a clean, tailored look.

reviews.name: DELPHINE OTIENO
reviews.comment: Gorgeous terracotta shade and the linen feels wonderfully soft. Zip is well hidden too.

reviews.name: GRIFFIN MOSS
reviews.comment: Nice cover, color is slightly more muted in person than in photos, which I actually preferred.

reviews.name: SOFIA ALMEIDA
reviews.comment: Ordered a few colors from this line, all consistent in quality and softness.

products.name: Hand-Stitched Heirloom Quilt
products.about: A generously sized quilt in a soft sage mist tone, hand-stitched in traditional patchwork detailing. Layered cotton batting gives it warmth without excess bulk, built to soften and last for generations.

reviews.name: ROSEMARY QUINN
reviews.comment: The stitching detail is exquisite. Feels like a real heirloom piece, worth every cent.

reviews.name: AUGUST HOLLOWAY
reviews.comment: Beautifully made and the sage color is calming in the bedroom. Already looks better with age.

reviews.name: CELESTE VARGAS
reviews.comment: Gorgeous quilt, a little lighter weight than I expected but perfect for warmer climates.

products.name: Artisan Ceramic Table Lamp
products.about: A table lamp with a hand-thrown sandstone ceramic base and a soft linen shade, casting warm ambient light. A tactile, sculptural companion for a nightstand or reading corner.

reviews.name: JASMINE OKORO
reviews.comment: Beautiful warm light and the ceramic base has lovely texture up close.

reviews.name: LEO ANDRADE
reviews.comment: Great lamp, cord is a bit short so plan your nightstand placement accordingly.

reviews.name: VIOLET NASH
reviews.comment: Pairs perfectly with the ceramic vase from the same series. Consistent quality.

products.name: Organic Cotton Percale Set
products.about: A crisp percale sheet set woven from certified organic cotton in a rich charcoal tone. Breathable and cool to the touch, softening beautifully wash after wash.

reviews.name: EVELYN MARSHALL
reviews.comment: Crisp and cool exactly as percale should be. The charcoal color hasn't faded after several washes.

reviews.name: XAVIER DUNN
reviews.comment: Great sheets, fitted sheet corners are a little snug on a thicker mattress.

reviews.name: LILA FONTAINE
reviews.comment: Best sheets we've bought in years. Genuinely breathable and soft.

products.name: Hand-Blown Bedside Carafe
products.about: A hand-blown glass carafe in a smoky tone, sized to sit quietly on a nightstand overnight. Slightly irregular by nature of hand-blowing, each piece carries its own subtle character.

reviews.name: AURORA BENITEZ
reviews.comment: So elegant on the nightstand. Love the smoky tint and the slight imperfections that make it feel handmade.

reviews.name: HUGO EMERSON
reviews.comment: Nice piece, glass is a little thinner than expected so handle with care.

reviews.name: MAEVE CONNOLLY
reviews.comment: A small, lovely upgrade to our nightstand routine. Fills easily and pours cleanly.

products.name: Chunky Merino Throw
products.about: An oversized throw hand-knit from chunky merino wool in a warm oatmeal tone. Substantial and airy at once, it's built to be a year-round layer on a sofa or bed.

reviews.name: FREYA LINDQVIST
reviews.comment: Impossibly soft and cozy. The chunky knit looks even better draped over our bed.

reviews.name: SEBASTIAN KOVAC
reviews.comment: Great throw, does shed a little at first but that settled down after a couple weeks.

reviews.name: NORA WHITFIELD
reviews.comment: Warm without being heavy. The oatmeal color goes with everything in our bedroom.

products.name: Brass & Glass Wall Sconce
products.about: A wall sconce pairing a brushed brass frame with a hand-blown glass shade, casting a warm, diffused glow. Hardwired installation for a clean, built-in look on either side of the bed.

reviews.name: BEATRIX HOLM
reviews.comment: Elegant fixture, the brushed brass finish is beautifully understated. Light diffusion is lovely.

reviews.name: JASPER REID
reviews.comment: Installation required an electrician for us, but the fixture itself is well made.

reviews.name: CAMILLE BOUCHARD
reviews.comment: Installed a pair as bedside sconces and they look fantastic. Solid brass hardware too.

products.name: Evening Ritual Candle Set
products.about: A set of hand-poured candles blending cedar and lavender for a calming evening scent. Long, even burn time makes them a nightly ritual rather than an occasional treat.

reviews.name: ADELINE FROST
reviews.comment: The cedar and lavender combination is so calming right before bed. Burns clean and even.

reviews.name: JULIAN VASQUEZ
reviews.comment: Lovely scent, subtle rather than overpowering, which I actually prefer for the bedroom.

reviews.name: STELLA MARCHETTI
reviews.comment: Part of our nightly routine now. The set makes a great gift too.
